ar.goals.buddy_explainer.body: A buddy is another member who chooses to support a public goal. They can see your updates, notice when progress stalls, and offer encouragement without taking over the goal.

pt.goals.buddy_explainer.body: A buddy is another member who chooses to support a public goal. They can see your updates, notice when progress stalls, and offer encouragement without taking over the goal.
pt.goals.buddy_explainer.how: Make a goal public if you want support. Use Discover to become a buddy for someone else, or Goal Buddies to follow goals you are helping with.
pt.goals.buddy_explainer.title: Goal buddies keep people moving
pt.goals.detail.no_buddy: No buddy yet. Public goals can be picked up from Discover by another member.
pt.goals.detail.progress_explainer: Progress is calculated from the current value against the target. Check-ins can update this percentage directly.
